issues: Role 'mayor' is marked as unique but found in multiple officials: Shawn Findley, John Skelton, Robert White, Brad Emel, Michael J. O'Brien, Roger E. Nylin, Bill McElwain, Sharon Ewen, Elizabeth M. Frost-Lenoir, Richard U. Perry, Robert D. Witty, Bill Kurz, Al Ligrani, Don Brewington, George D. Walraven, James Stott
